reviews.comment:
Genial estuvimos en esta estación de Garayalde y muy amables los baños impecables y mucha gente ojalá siempre sigan así

(Translated by Google)
Great! We were at this Garayalde station and the staff were very friendly, the bathrooms were spotless and there were lots of people. I hope they always stay like this.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Great, like all YPF stations. What caught my attention was that at all of them, the water for mate is free.
